description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular green dumpster with a flat, hinged lid and two visible wheels at the rear base for mobility. The dumpster is accompanied by four large, black, shiny garbage bags placed around it, suggesting active use in waste collection. The lid appears to be made of the same material as the body and is designed to be lifted from the front, with a subtle handle or grip visible. The surface of the dumpster is smooth and hard, likely constructed from molded plastic or metal, and the wheels are small and robust for easy movement. There are no visible warning labels, stickers, or signage on the exterior. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for placement in urban environments such as sidewalks, alleys, or residential streets.
description: A green, wheeled dumpster with a flat lid and four black garbage bags placed around it, featuring a smooth, hard surface and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid, front-facing handle, and three garbage bags clustered to the right and one to the left.
description_view_1: Side view with the dumpster's left side mostly visible, three garbage bags in the foreground, and the lid's thickness apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the dumpster, both wheels, and all four garbage bags distributed around it.
description_view_3: Right side view with two garbage bags visible, the side of the dumpster, and one wheel partially visible.
attribute_lid_type: flat, single-section, hinged plastic lid with a front grip; no visible locking mechanism
attribute_handle_design: single, shallow front grip integrated into the lid; plastic; no side or rear handles visible
